texto: The concept of patriotism is not incompatible with that of humanity; on the contrary, let me state emphatically that he who best serves pacifism serves patriotism best. The nation is and can be no more than the vital basic unit of any international league.
explicacao: Citação de Leon Bourgeois sobre temas ligados a motivacao. “The concept of patriotism is not incompatible with that of humanity; on the contrary, let me stat…” articula motivacao, inspiracional, humanity em registro de motivacao, com relevância para contextos como inspiracao e humanity.

frase_original: The concept of patriotism is not incompatible with that of humanity; on the contrary, let me state emphatically that he who best serves pacifism serves patriotism best. The nation is and can be no more than the vital basic unit of any international league.

texto: At first, laws evolved out of religious doctrines. It followed that they were recognized only when advantageous to those who practiced the same religion and who appeared equals under the protection of the same gods. For the members of all other cults, there was neither law nor mercy.
explicacao: Citação de Leon Bourgeois sobre temas ligados a fe. “At first, laws evolved out of religious doctrines. It followed that they were recognized only whe…” articula fe, law, mercy em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como mercy e protection.

frase_original: At first, laws evolved out of religious doctrines. It followed that they were recognized only when advantageous to those who practiced the same religion and who appeared equals under the protection of the same gods. For the members of all other cults, there was neither law nor mercy.
